title: 10 best herbal teas for postoperative recovery
description: Ceylon cinnamon teas helps with postoperative recovery because it possesses a unique combination of properties that promote comfort, relaxation, and reduced inflammation. The tea's warming nature soothes digestive issues, common after surgery, while its antioxidant compounds alleviate pain and discomfort. Additionally, Ceylon cinnamon has natural anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce swelling and promote healthy wound healing. As a result, patients can experience improved...
